subsection.heading: Federal Charter.—
subsection.content: Military Officers Association of America (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit organization that meets the requirements for a veterans service organization under section 501(c)(19) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 and is organized under the laws of the Commonwealth of Virginia, is a federally chartered corporation.

subsection.heading: Expiration of Charter.—
subsection.content: If the corporation does not comply with the provisions of this chapter, the charter granted by subsection (a) shall expire.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 501 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, referred to in subsec. (a), is classified to section 501 of Title 26, Internal Revenue Code.
